text.zh: Swin Transformer 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Swin Transformer is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: Swin Transformer 通过构建层级特征图并把自注意力限制在移位局部窗口内，把 Transformer 适配到密集视觉任务。这让 Transformer 骨干网络更适合需要多尺度特征的分类、检测和分割工作。
text.en: Swin Transformer adapted transformers to dense vision by building hierarchical feature maps and limiting self-attention to shifted local windows. This made transformer backbones practical for classification, detection, and segmentation workloads that need multi-scale features.
